summary: Re-tested alpha stabilization for landing/static assets, auth, authenticated RPC flows, privacy export/delete, and regression suite. Public landing route responds, but static bundles still return 500 and Prisma better-sqlite3 binding failures continue to break signup/login and all authenticated flows.

critical.issue: Demo login returns 401; no session established because Prisma DB access fails at runtime.
Valid payload returns 400. Root cause remains Prisma better-sqlite3 native binding load failure; handler masks infra failure as Invalid input.
Authenticated deterministic flows and privacy lifecycle remain blocked because account/session creation fails upstream.

minor.issue: Regression tests still fallback to localhost when REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is absent, conflicting with public-endpoint-only policy.

ui_bugs.issue: Critical CSS/JS/font chunks under /_next/static/* return 500, leaving pages mostly unstyled and degrading UX.

integration_issues.issue: Submit keeps user on /login? (no redirect to /dashboard) because auth callback fails.
Submit keeps user on /register? (no redirect to /onboarding) because /rpc/register returns 400.
Cannot be exercised end-to-end due to upstream auth+registration breakage.

issues: Typography, spacing, and visual hierarchy degrade to browser defaults because stylesheet/font assets fail with 500 responses.

action_items: Fix better-sqlite3 native binding availability for Node v20 linux/arm64 runtime so Prisma can connect.
Update /rpc/register error handling to distinguish validation (400) from infrastructure/runtime failures (500).
Resolve /_next/static/* 500s so JS/CSS/fonts load and client app is fully interactive.
After infra fix, rerun authenticated regression and UI journeys for mission/revenue/logs/reports/settings privacy export/delete.
critical_code_review_comments: Over-broad catch block in /src/app/rpc/register/route.ts hides server/runtime failures as client validation errors.
Auth and RPC layers assume Prisma is always healthy; missing health guard/fail-fast response causes cascading user-facing failures.
Test fixtures include localhost fallback instead of strict env-only URL usage required by policy.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest rerun result: 28 total, 21 passed, 3 failed, 4 errors. Failures are unchanged from prior run and still rooted in Prisma better-sqlite3 binding load issues. Playwright smoke confirms landing loads but static asset 500s persist and auth/register flows do not redirect.
rca of the issue: Repro: run pytest against /app/tests/*.py and submit login/register in UI. /rpc/register returns 400 for valid payload; /auth/callback/credentials fails and session remains unauthenticated. Runtime logs repeatedly show 'Could not locate the bindings file ... better_sqlite3.node' for Node v20 linux arm64 paths. In parallel, requests for /_next/static/chunks/* and /_next/static/media/* return 500, causing unstyled UI. Mitigation: rebuild/install architecture-correct better-sqlite3 binary and restore static bundle serving; then rerun seed/auth regression.
mocked_api: No MOCKED APIs used in this run.
